meta.title: Sorare x Solana: Transforming Sports, Crypto, and Collecting

transcript: Hi everyone. At Sorare we are bringing the best IP in the world of sports onchain. And uh to do that, we are um producing officially licensed uh cards that you can play in a fantasy sports game where you can win thousands of SOL every single week. So for those of you uh who don't know about um... for those of you who don't know about Sorare, uh the... basically the the the product is quite simple. Uh you would you would scout uh the athletes that you love, you collect these cards, and you can play with them in a fantasy sports game. And based on the performance of the player on the pitch, you can win uh money-can't-buy experiences like meeting Zidane or Mbappé or uh or athletes uh or uh prizes like SOL uh and so on. We work with the best sports league in the world, the NBA, the Premier League, LaLiga, Bundesliga and so on. They are all shareholders in the company uh and long-term believers in the vision that we have to bring uh the best IP of the of sports onchain. Uh we also have uh the best athletes uh that invested in the company, people like Messi, Zidane, Mbappé and more uh are part of uh of this uh of this j... this journey, sorry, uh and uh and this vision. So here you have uh an example of a reward that has been won by some community members where you see uh community members... Sorare community members playing uh with Zidane uh which is one of the best soccer player ever. Um so we spent the five years of our journey in the Ethereum ecosystem uh starting with a Layer 2 then back to mainchain then up to StarkWare on StarkNet. And uh few months ago with the team uh we were like okay what uh what could be the best ne... next move for us and for our community and looking at uh the technology of course, performance, distribution, community, ecosystem and so on. And um everything was pointing uh into one direction uh which is Solana. And uh two weeks ago uh we completed the the migration of 17 million cards uh to Solana. So we are very excited uh about that of course. It's a first step. It's uh a technical migration and there's much much more coming soon and we we'll talk about this. So how does it feel today uh in the Sorare product? It just works. And it's very smooth. So you would come uh with your favorite wallet. Uh you can deposit uh SOL. You can also buy cards uh directly uh at a fixed price or you can bid uh on the marketplace on these officially licensed cards. And you can also be paid uh in SOL. So if you decide to resell uh your card you can get SOL uh and you can win SOL of course uh in the weekly and now daily uh contests and competition that we are oper... sorry operating. Um so it's it's a global ecosystem uh where now these cards uh you can enjoy them and see them in your favorite wallets uh as uh cNFTs. Uh and uh we are also breaking the the silos in terms of marketplace because uh these cards used to be tradable in our uh own marketplace uh and uh they will be now tradable in many more uh marketplaces. So Magic Eden is here uh so increasing liquidity, price discovery uh and so on. Um and um I'm very excited uh today uh to announce that we are launching a builder program. Uh so our vision as I said is to bring the best IP of the world of sports onchain. So yes it's nice you can collect them, you can trade them, you can win the best prize in the world of of sports every day every week. Uh but now you will also be able to enjoy uh different DeFi and gaming experiences that gonna be built uh by uh a network uh of builders. And uh yeah very excited to launch it uh today. Um if uh you have interest uh in the builder program uh feel free to contact us. Uh you can do so at uh solana.sorare.com. Uh let's build the future of sports and crypto. Let's do it together. Thank you.

sources.title: Solana GP S1 NFT Pack Free Mint Now Live
sources.snippet:
# Solana GP S1 NFT Pack Free Mint Now Live

Solana Gaming opens free Season 1 Game Pass NFT pack mint on Magic Eden. Mint up to 2 packs per wallet until Dec 4. Packs reveal prizes next week on DRIP SHOP.

[Eliza Crichton-Stuart](https://gam3s.gg/users/ElizaCrichtonS/)•

Updated Nov 30, 2025

Solana Gaming has launched a free mint for its Season 1 Game Pass NFT booster pack, now live on Magic Eden. Players with a Solana wallet can claim up to two packs by paying a small network fee, estimated at roughly $2 in SOL. The mint is open to all users with no supply cap and will run until December 4, 2025. These packs are strictly digital collectibles and cannot be traded or resold. They are designed to complement the broader Season 1 event without impacting gameplay or leaderboard standings.

## Solana GP S1 NFT Pack Free Mint Now Live

Minting is straightforward and does not require a whitelist or registration. Users simply connect their [Solana wallet](https://gam3s.gg/chains/solana/) on Magic Eden, complete the transaction, and receive the packs directly in their wallet. The packs will remain sealed until next week, when the official reveal window begins on DRIP SHOP, a platform designed for live on-chain card openings. Until the reveal, the contents cannot be viewed.

Each NFT booster pack contains a set of [collectible cards tied to](https://gam3s.gg/genres/card/) the Solana Game Pass: Season 1. The cards are purely digital collectibles and do not affect gameplay or unlock special access. The full collection includes 66 cards, sourced from multiple projects within the Solana ecosystem.

Cards are categorized into three rarity tiers, and some packs may include hidden prizes randomly distributed among the supply. Solana Gaming has confirmed that over $10,000 in rewards will be revealed during pack openings. These prizes can include NFTs, digital goods, or other digital items, all recorded to the user’s wallet once revealed.

## Big $40,000 Prize Pool

The reveal process is scheduled for next week on DRIP SHOP, though an exact date has not been confirmed. When the window opens, users will connect their wallets to dripshop.live and open their packs in real time. Each card appears sequentially, showing its rarity and design, and any bonus prizes are revealed during this process. The experience is designed to mirror traditional card-pull openings, offering a simple digital collectible experience.

The NFT pack drop runs parallel to the main Season 1 event, which launched in October and is built around weekly quests hosted on Galxe. Players complete social and in-game tasks to earn points, which serve as raffle entries for a $40,000 prize pool.

Unlike the previous season, Season 1 does not require an access NFT to participate. Quests rotate weekly and feature different Solana-based [games, including titles](https://gam3s.gg/games/) like Star Atlas, Cross The Ages, Octo Gaming, PrimeSkill, and Pikamoon Game. Arena-style mini-events are also included, providing bonus rewards for top performers.

The NFT packs are intended as a lighter side activity, allowing users to engage with the season without committing to the main quests. They offer a nostalgia-inspired collectible experience but do not grant additional points or influence competition outcomes.

## Final Thoughts

Solana Gaming emphasizes that these packs are not intended for speculation or trading. All cards and prizes are one-time digital collectibles with no resale value. The drop is intended to encourage participation and connection within the Solana gaming community while offering a simple and accessible collectible experience.

The mint will remain open until 11:59 PM UTC on December 4, 2025, with each wallet limited to two packs. Once the mint closes, no additional packs will be created, but users can open any claimed packs during the official reveal on DRIP SHOP.

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

**Can anyone mint the Season 1 NFT pack?** Yes, the mint is open to all S

# Coinbase Opens Trading for All Solana Tokens to 100 million Users in Major On-Chain Shift
By[Liam Turner](https://www.cryptoninjas.net/authors/liam/)
December 11, 2025
* 3min read
![coinbase-opens-trading-solana-tokens](https://www.cryptoninjas.net/wp-content/uploads/coinbase-opens-trading-solana-tokens.jpeg)
**Key Takeaways:**
* Coinbase will allow its 100M users to trade every Solana token instantlythrough a fully on-chain integration.
* No listings required– tokens become tradeable the moment they appear on Solana, using on-chain liquidity routed through Coinbase’s interface.
* The move signals a structural shiftas centralized exchanges lean toward blockchain-native markets and real-time asset discovery.
Coinbase has taken one of its largest steps yet toward on-chain markets, announcing that every Solana token will now be instantly tradeable inside its main app. The update gives millions of retail and professional users direct access to Solana’s rapidly expanding token ecosystem without relying on traditional exchange listings.
The change aligns with a broader trend across the industry: centralized platforms increasingly serve as gateways to

Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform  | Drift Updates

## Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform
December 4, 2025
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6310e7dee49f08e5798eed50/693023e13e4b72ada17e0fe2_2025-12-03%2017.19.13.jpg)
[
Contents
](#)
[
Contents
](#)
[
](https://twitter.com/driftprotocol)[
](https://discord.com/invite/fMcZBH8ErM)
[
Trade Now
](https://app.drift.trade/)
![]()
![]()
Drift v3 is the protocol’s biggest performance upgrade yet. Rebuilt around trader execution, v3 delivers**10x faster fills, 10x improved liquidity, and a cleaner, more intuitive interface**than v2.
This upgrade was built for one thing: outperformance. Instant execution. Deeper liquidity. A suite of tools that helps you trade faster and with more confidence.
Drift v2 was the first to bring cross-margin and multi-asset collateral to DeFi on-chain trading. We built on Solana to deliver NASDAQ-level performance on-chain and with major Solana upgrades like Alpenglow, Firedancer and Jito’s Block Assembly Market (BAM), Drift is built to outperform as the network scales.
Since launch, Drift has surpassed 1.5B in TVL, $133B+ in total trading volume and $650M in open interest. Drift v3 is built to take those numbers and your trading even further.
**Drift v3 will be available on Dec 4, 2025.**New users will need an invite code to access Drift v3.
**DM**[**@DriftProtocol**](https://x.com/DriftProtocol)**to request access.**
## Why v3?
Drift v3 represents the protocol’s next stage of maturity: the point where years of infrastructure, liquidity, and execution improvements converge into a faster, clearer, more reliable trading experience.
**Over the past year, Drift has evolved in three critical areas:**
1. Execution speed
2. Liquidity depth
3. Trader experience## How Drift v3 outperforms
*The road to v3 was focused on improving liquidity, trading execution and speed. Here’s what that looks like in practice:*
### **Trading Execution and Speed**
* **10x faster order fills:**On Drift v3, 85% of market orders are filled within the same slot. A slot is Solana’s smallest time unit (about 400 milliseconds). On Drift, that means that trades are executed in under half a second. Instant execution.
* **15x faster take profit/stop loss triggers:**For BTC, it dropped from 15 slots (\~6 seconds) to 1 slot (\~0.4 seconds). This means your risk controls and exits now trigger immediately, reducing slippage and missed opportunities.
* **Gasless trading by default:**Unlike other DEXs, where you pay gas on every trade, Drift abstracts gas fees so that’s one less thing to worry about eating into profits
* **400ms oracle updates**: Prices update every 400 millisecond (roughly 2.5 times per second). This keeps quotes accurate and reduces the chance of stale pricing.
* **Scales with Solana:**As Solana increases block size and throughput, Drift automatically gets faster too, handling more trades per second.### **Liquidity**
* **10x reduction in slippage on market orders:**In Drift v2, large market orders could move the price by 20 bps. In v3, that’s been cut to just 2 bps. Traders now get far better pricing, especially on size.
* **5x tighter TP/SL execution:**Take-profit and stop-loss orders are far more precise. On major markets like SOL and BTC, fills are 4x tighter, while non-majors see up to 5x improvement. This means exits trigger closer to the price you set, reducing losses and protecting gains.
* **Introduction of Drift Liquidity Provider (DLP)**: Provides liquidity for both Perps and Spot markets. Community members can deposit funds into DLP to support market-making and earn a share of the pool's profits. Currently in the testing stage. Public launch in Q1 2026.
* **Expanded Market Maker Program:**With v3’s expanded market maker initiatives, long-tail altcoins now hav

tags.impact_reason: Sorare, a major player in blockchain gaming and sports collectibles, has fully migrated to Solana, bringing 17 million cards and a large user base to the ecosystem, enhancing Solana's gaming and NFT presence.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a 'vortex of digital cards' as the Semantic Anchor to directly visualize the massive scale of the '17 Million Assets' migration mentioned in the headline. The cards are the core product being moved. I included the diegetic text '17M' as a glowing holographic projection to emphasize this key metric directly within the high-tech, data-driven scene, fitting the Wired Magazine aesthetic.
visual_idea.description: A massive, swirling digital vortex dominates a dark, cavernous space. This tornado is composed of millions of glowing, semi-translucent crystalline sports cards, each depicting a faint holographic athlete. The stream of cards flows from a dark, fragmented background towards the viewer, coalescing into a vibrant, orderly destination just out of frame. Cutting through the scene, a massive, holographic data projection glows with the diegetic text '17M', its neon light casting volumetric rays through the data stream, representing the sheer scale of the asset migration.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A monumental, vertical composition (3:4 aspect ratio) capturing a massive, swirling digital vortex dominating a dark, cavernous space. The vortex is composed of millions of glowing, semi-translucent crystalline sports cards, each depicting a faint holographic athlete. This intricate stream of crystalline data shards flows with an epic scale from a dark, fragmented background towards the viewer, coalescing into a vibrant, orderly destination just out of frame at the bottom. The cavernous space and fragmented background are rendered with textures reminiscent of highly polished obsidian, reflecting the soft neon mixed lighting from the scene. Cutting through the scene, a massive, holographic data projection glows intensely, forming the diegetic text '17M'. Its volumetric neon light casts dramatic, soft blended neon shadows and ethereal rays that cut through and illuminate the digital data stream, emphasizing the sheer scale of the asset migration. The top of the frame features vast negative space, enhancing the feeling of immense height and monumentality. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, cinematic volumetric lighting.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a 'vortex of digital cards' as the Semantic Anchor to directly visualize the massive scale of the '17 Million Assets' migration mentioned in the headline. The cards are the core product being moved. I included the diegetic text '17M' as a glowing holographic projection to emphasize this key metric directly within the high-tech, data-driven scene, fitting the Wired Magazine aesthetic.
visual_idea.description: A macro, square-cropped view into the river of migrating assets. Several crystalline, semi-transparent digital sports cards are caught in mid-flight, tumbling over each other. Volumetric neon light catches their sharp, geometric edges, revealing intricate holographic player stats and circuitry patterns etched onto their surfaces. The background is a motion-blurred cascade of thousands of other cards, creating a powerful sense of speed and overwhelming data flow.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro, square-cropped view, centrally focused and perfectly symmetrical, filling the frame with intricate texture. The scene captures a dynamic river of migrating digital assets: several crystalline, semi-transparent digital sports cards are caught in mid-flight, tumbling over each other with a sense of urgent motion. These cards exhibit sharp, geometric edges and polished obsidian-like surfaces, reflecting and refracting intense, volumetric neon light in electric blue and vivid magenta. The light spectacularly catches their facets, revealing intricate, deeply etched holographic player stats that glow subtly from within the crystalline material, alongside complex circuitry patterns pulsing with cyber-green energy across their forms. The background is a dense, motion-blurred cascade of thousands of other cards, each contributing to a powerful sense of overwhelming data flow and extreme speed, creating a Digital Exodus. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, cinematic, photorealistic, depth of field, motion blur, glowing, intricate details, highly reflective, studio lighting, dramatic.

editorial.headline: Sorare Migrates 17 Million Assets to Solana, Launches Builder Program
editorial.standfirst: The fantasy sports giant abandons Ethereum Layer-2 solutions to leverage Solana’s compression technology for mass-scale asset portability. This strategic pivot opens officially licensed IP from the NBA and Premier League to the broader Solana developer ecosystem.
key_takeaways: Completed the migration of 17 million digital cards from StarkWare to Solana as cNFTs.
Assets are now fully composable within Solana wallets and tradable on Magic Eden.
Launched a Builder Program inviting developers to create DeFi and gaming layers atop licensed sports IP.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
In a decisive move that challenges the prevailing narrative around Ethereum Layer-2 dominance for consumer applications, **Sorare** has completed the migration of its entire 17-million-asset state to Solana. Previously utilizing **StarkWare** and Ethereum, the fantasy sports unicorn identified Solana’s high-throughput architecture as the necessary infrastructure to support its massive scale. This technical migration, finalized two weeks prior to the announcement, utilizes Solana’s compressed NFT (cNFT) standard, drastically reducing state costs while ensuring instant settleability for millions of users.

The implications for on-chain liquidity are substantial. Historically, **Sorare** operated as a semi-walled garden with its own proprietary marketplace. By shifting to **cNFTs**, these assets—representing officially licensed IP from the **NBA**, **Premier League**, **LaLiga**, and **Bundesliga**—are now fully composable within the broader Solana ecosystem. Users can hold assets in self-custodial wallets like Phantom and, crucially, trade them on open marketplaces such as **Magic Eden**. This integration effectively financializes fantasy sports assets, allowing for deeper price discovery and the denomination of trades and rewards directly in **SOL**.

Looking beyond the infrastructure shift, the introduction of the **Sorare Builder Program** represents a significant alpha opportunity for developers. By opening its API and asset standards, **Sorare** is effectively allowing third-party builders to construct new gaming loops and DeFi derivatives on top of world-class sports IP. This moves the platform from a single application to a foundational protocol layer for sports data, enabling a new class of prediction markets, lending protocols, or side-games involving athletes like **Kylian Mbappé** and **Zinedine Zidane**.
